events.event_description: Establishment of consular relations in Siam when John Hassett Chandler became Acting Vice Consul in Charge.

evidence.quote: John Hassett Chandler became the Acting Vice Consul in Charge on January 25, 1859.

events.event_description: Establishment of diplomatic relations and the first U.S. Legation in Thailand (then Siam) when John A. Halderman presented credentials as Minister Resident and Consul General.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations and the first U.S. Legation in Thailand (then Siam) were established on October 23, 1882, when John A. Halderman presented his credentials as Minister Resident and Consul General.

events.event_description: Elevation of the American Legation to Embassy status, with Edwin F. Stanton promoted to become the first U.S. Ambassador to Thailand.

evidence.quote: On April 10, 1947, Edwin F. Stanton was promoted to become the first U.S. Ambassador to Thailand. Stanton presented his credentials on May 9, 1947.
